## SpaceX Stock Slips Below IPO Price as Valuation Debate Intensifies

Breaking below the IPO price in early trading often dampens retail momentum and can trigger lock-up-adjacent selling pressure; the valuation debate going public suggests the market has not yet converged on a framework for pricing SPCX.

- SPCX is trading below its IPO price — a notable early negative technical signal.
- Valuation debate is described as heating up, implying divergent views on the appropriate price.
- Single outlet; high confidence from classifier.
- No specific price levels beyond 'below IPO' are stated.
